title: CGMES Validation Configuration
description: Configuration for the OpenCGMES SPARQL/SHACL validator. Place this file at .cgmes/validation.json in your workspace root.

schemasDirectory.description: Path to a directory containing RDFS profile files (.rdf, .ttl, .owl). All files in the directory are loaded as schema profiles. Path is resolved relative to the workspace root.

schemas.description: List of individual RDFS profile files to load. Each entry is a path relative to the workspace root.

items.description: Path to an RDFS profile file (.rdf, .ttl, or .owl), relative to the workspace root.

namedGraphs.description: Maps named graph IRIs (or short relative names like "EQ") to one or more profile version IRIs. When set, terms inside a GRAPH <iri> {} block are validated against the mapped profiles only instead of all profiles. Graphs referenced in the query but absent from the map produce a GRAPH_NOT_CONFIGURED warning.

additionalProperties.description: One or more profile version IRIs for this graph.

strictness.description:
Controls which findings are reported and how their severities are mapped.

• permissive — only unknown-term and syntax errors; semantic checks and hints are suppressed. Good for exploratory queries against an incomplete schema.
• default — all checks, original severities. Only errors fail validation.
• strict — all checks; warnings are promoted to errors. Recommended for CI.
• pedantic — all checks; warnings and hints are promoted to errors.

prefixes.description: Custom default PREFIX declarations injected into every SPARQL query that does not already declare them. Omit this field to use the built-in defaults (rdf, rdfs, owl, xsd, sh, cim, md). Set to {} to disable all default prefixes. Provide an explicit map to replace the built-in defaults entirely.

additionalProperties.description: Namespace IRI for this prefix, e.g. "http://iec.ch/TC57/CIM100#"
